description: Legal record (#38) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (ll. 13-19 on f. 14r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated Kislev 5335 AM (1574 CE), a chronological leap 12 years after the entry on the same page (PGPID 41078). This later entry is incomplete and recounts a debt acknowledgement between Shelomo b. Shemuʾel known as al-Fulādī and ʿAbd al-Karīm b. Shemuʾel al-Levi aka al-Qayīm. Shelomo commits to repay the sum within a seven-month timespan. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
